name: Smart Cube
short_description: Smart Cube is a first-person puzzle game where you have to escape from a scientific experiment. Get ready to have your intellect tested!
detailed_description:
Smart Cube is a first-person puzzle game where you have to escape from a scientific experiment. Get ready to have your intellect tested! The game comes with a lot of obstacles. Gameplay consists of placing or destroy cubes, adding jump pads, or using other devices in order to reach the exit, but this is not very easy to achieve, because the path is blocked by obstacles. The levels contain special tools that help player to plan his escape.

GAME FEATURES

  • 50 levels
  • 7 colors
  • Build and destroy cubes
  • Add or remove jump pads
  • Steam Achievements
  • Steam Cloud Save

supported_languages: English, Romanian, German, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Italian, Polish, French, Portuguese - Brazil
